description_long: This sconce features a broad, circular metal shade with a matte black finish, accented by several copper-toned decorative fasteners evenly spaced around its surface. The shade is attached to a short, curved arm that connects to a round wall mount, both of which share the same black metallic appearance. The arm has a segmented design, adding a subtle industrial touch. The underside of the shade is slightly recessed, with a central fixture likely housing the light source. The overall construction appears robust, with visible rivets and a utilitarian yet stylish aesthetic. The combination of black and copper elements gives the sconce a vintage industrial look suitable for urban exteriors.
description: A matte black metal sconce with copper accents, featuring a wide circular shade and a curved arm attached to a round wall mount. The design is industrial and robust, with visible decorative fasteners.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved arm, round wall mount, and the wide, slightly domed shade with copper fasteners.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the circular wall mount and the attachment point of the arm, with the shade's copper accents visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the arm's curve and the distribution of copper fasteners on the shade.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the shade, revealing the central fixture and the recessed area for the light source.
attribute_fixture_design: Industrial vintage style with a matte black finish and copper accents, featuring a robust, utilitarian form and visible fasteners for a rugged urban look.
